headline: 13.12% of credit card balances are now 90+ days late
context: That's the highest delinquency rate in 15 years — just 0.6% from the Great Recession peak of 13.7%.

headline: US inflation just jumped to 4.2% — the highest in over a year
context: Energy costs drove 60% of the May CPI increase. Markets are now pricing in a rate hike by October.

items.reason: AI server revenue up 757% YoY to $16.1B — stock up 242% in 2026 with a $51.3B backlog
Down 68% from its Aug 2025 peak near $5K — sitting at $1,566 near key $1,500 support
Down 40% YTD but raised guidance to $7.65B — Q1 revenue and EPS both beat estimates

headline: 42% of Americans think they'll carry credit card debt for life
context: With the average APR at 21.52% and total card debt at a record $1.33 trillion, that belief is becoming a self-fulfilling prophecy.

headline: The 30% rule that separates millionaires from everyone else
context: Live on 70% of your income. Save and invest 30%. Automate it on payday — if it's not automatic, it won't happen.
